positive: A central, highly stylized illustration featuring a majestic mountain lion silhouetted against a vibrant, sunset-drenched gradient sky. The mountain lion should be depicted in a dynamic, powerful pose, leaping across stylized rock formations. The style must be modern vector art, mixing elements of neo-tribal patterns and minimalist linework. Incorporate complementary color palettes: deep burnt oranges, warm golds, cool deep blues, and emerald greens. Use bold, thick outlines for strong contrast and high readability when printed on fabric. The composition must be centered and vertically balanced, optimized for an apparel print, with ample negative space around the main subject for versatility. Highly detailed yet clean and flat-graphic.
negative: blur, noisy, artifacts, low resolution, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, mutated, disfigured, bokeh, poor composition, grainy, realistic photography, 3d render
